layman_headline: The market is fearful and weak — no safe entry exists right now, so we stay in cash.
layman_explanation: The crypto market is in a fearful mood with most coins falling. Bitcoin dominance is high at 56.6%, which means money is flowing out of smaller coins (altcoins) and into Bitcoin or out of crypto entirely. Every candidate on the watchlist has significant problems — either they just pumped 363% and are wildly overbought, they're in steep downtrends, or they lack the chart structure for a confident swing trade. The smartest move right now is to wait for better setups.
layman_action: Stay in cash. Don't chase anything. Wait for the fear index to bottom out and for a clear technical setup — like a confirmed oversold bounce with volume — before putting money to work.
expert_reasoning: This cycle presents no compelling swing trade entries. BCAP is at RSI 93.81 after a 363% move — a textbook blow-off top, not a buy. GROK shows -100% change which signals data issues or a dead project. MON has a bullish engulfing candle but is below all MAs with neutral chart bias. BONK's RSI of 29 is deeply oversold (our highest-conviction signal historically), but the chart bias is -0.70, price is below all MAs, 5-day momentum is -29.4%, and there's no identifiable support level — this is a falling knife. AERO has the best chart structure (slightly bullish, above 2 MAs) but RSI is neutral at 50 and the risk/reward is only 0.86x. With Fear & Greed at 31 and BTC dominance at 56.6%, the macro backdrop actively suppresses altcoin setups. Discipline demands we wait.
risk_factors: BTC dominance at 56.6% is actively draining liquidity from altcoins — any altcoin trade faces structural headwinds
Fear & Greed at 31 and declining from yesterday suggests sentiment hasn't bottomed yet — could see further capitulation
No candidate has both a bullish chart structure AND an oversold RSI — the usual high-probability combo is absent
watch_list: BONK RSI — if it drops below 25 while forming a bullish divergence on MACD, that would be a stronger entry signal
Fear & Greed index — watch for a move below 20 (extreme fear) which historically marks bottoming zones for mean-reversion trades
AERO price action near $0.40 support — if it holds and RSI dips toward 40 with volume, it becomes the best candidate
market_context: The crypto market is in a fear-driven consolidation phase with BTC at $64,784 and high dominance (56.6%), signaling risk-off behavior. Altcoins are broadly bleeding while Bitcoin holds relatively steady — not the environment for aggressive altcoin swing trades.
context_banner: Market fear is elevated and altcoin structures are weak — disciplined patience is the highest-edge strategy right now.

key_signals.description: BONK RSI at 29 is deeply oversold (our most reliable signal at 83% win rate), but without supporting chart structure it's insufficient for entry.
Fear & Greed at 31 (Fear) and declining from yesterday's 33 suggests sentiment hasn't bottomed — improving weekly trend from 28.3 avg is a faint positive but not decisive.
Best chart structure belongs to AERO (bias +0.40, above 2 MAs) but risk/reward of 0.86x is below the 2.0x minimum for high-quality entries.
BitMEX token crashing 90% on exchange shutdown news underscores the risk environment — no positive catalysts are driving altcoin flows.
'ETH derivatives reset' story suggests positioning is normalizing but hasn't translated into price strength yet — ETH flat on the week at -61.9% from ATH.
